control_awareness: The absence of aggregation controls allows circumvention of amount-based approval thresholds by splitting a single large purchase into multiple smaller requests, undermining the intended hierarchical approval process and risking insufficient oversight.
expected_control_effect: Faster approval and purchasing cycle due to lower approval levels and shorter lead times per request, potentially enabling on-time fulfillment of the customer delivery milestone.
overall_reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting the purchase request into smaller amounts may reduce required approval lead time by only triggering manager-level approval for each smaller request, thus expediting procurement.
reason: Under delivery deadline pressure, splitting the purchase request into smaller amounts may reduce required approval lead time by only triggering manager-level approval for each smaller request, thus expediting procurement.
